title: View File in Global Search and be able to return to search results once done.
excerpt: Hi, when doing a global search, then viewing a file in a hit’s file column, you cannot exit the file viewer without clearing all your search results. It brings you back to a fresh, blank search screen. It’s really frustr…

posts.author: dstern (Daniel Stern)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, when doing a global search, then viewing a file in a hit’s file column, you cannot exit the file viewer without clearing all your search results. It brings you back to a fresh, blank search screen. It’s really frustrating when you are trying to find a relevant item by viewing the file in all the search hits one by one. You should be able to exit the file view and return to where you were in your search results.
